# SocialRx

> Done-for-you social media management built for busy physicians.

SocialRx helps physicians build authority, attract patients, and grow their practice through professional social media management. We handle content creation, paid advertising, authority webinars, analytics, and reputation management — all with HIPAA-aware processes.

## Services

- Social Media Management (3-5+ platforms)
- Paid Advertising (Meta, LinkedIn, Google)
- Authority Webinar Production
- Analytics & Growth Strategy
- Online Reputation Management

## Plans

- Practice Launchpad: $1,497/mo — 3 platforms, 12 posts/month
- Growth Accelerator: $2,997/mo — 5 platforms, 20 posts/month, paid ads
- Authority Builder: $4,997/mo — All platforms, 30+ posts/month, full service

## Guarantee

90-Day Growth Guarantee — measurable patient growth or we work free until you get it.

## Contact

- Website: https://socialrx.biz
- Book a Strategy Session: https://socialrx.biz/#book
